To determine if the model (a vertical line) appears in the pattern, we need to look for an exact match of the vertical line in the second image. The model must be in the same orientation (not rotated or tilted).

In the second image, there is no vertical line present. All the lines are either diagonal or horizontal. Therefore, the model does not appear in the pattern.
